app_api_key.description: Customer.io App API key. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Customer.io App API base URL for your region: https://api.customer.io/v1 (US) or https://api-eu.customer.io/v1 (EU). Required: legacy derived this from a region config value, but the engine dialect has no config-derivation mechanism for a base URL (see docs.md Known limits), so the resolved URL must be supplied directly.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
